versions.highlight: Better profile and list experience with bug fixes.

items: Added account settings for MyAnimeList and AniList
Added list mode options in Profile
Added image carousel in character and person details
Added a clear date option in the date picker
Improved profile management
Improved Profile text and icon styling
Fixed reset button text color in My List sort/filter
Fixed spacing issues in My List and Active Notifications

versions.highlight: Added AniList Support, better My List Experience, and stability fixes.

items: AniList login and account linking

Notification checks and auth-aware messaging

versions.highlight: Bug fixes for sharing, list management, connectivity, and UI polish.

items: Sharing anime and manga now uses the correct display title
Sharing now includes cover images and a source message
Completed media correctly records a finish date in your list
Anime subscription updates and cache cleanup work reliably
Seasonal anime filtering is more accurate
Source information now displays correctly in the Details tab
Connectivity status detection and its UI feedback are more reliable
No Internet screen now matches the app theme
Added a helpful description for account deletion in the Support screen
Minor layout and text color fixes in the About Niro screen

versions.highlight: Niro is now officially in stable release.

items: Public stable release of Niro
Better overall app reliability and smoother performance
Cleaner settings and profile experience
General bug fixes for a more stable experience

versions.highlight: New settings tools, better connectivity handling, and smoother profile/list experience.

items: Added a dedicated Genre screen with improved genre navigation
Added My List Settings screen
Added Support screen
Added offline handling with a No Internet state
Added more legal/provider details in About Niro
Settings now show app version info and clearer icons
Updated toast visuals and success feedback
Added haptic feedback when selecting genre chips
UI layouts are now more responsive across different screen sizes
Improved list/profile UI consistency and messaging across multiple screens
Improved auth and API reliability, including cache handling and domain-specific exception handling
Refined airing countdown display in the InfoBar
Fixed card radius token usage for more consistent UI
Updated support screen title text for better clarity

versions.highlight: Smoother startup experience

items: Splash screen now stays visible while app settings and fonts finish loading

items: Next airing episode info on anime details

Notification tap routing is more consistent

versions.highlight: New anime notifications, a cleaner Discover/Search flow, and smoother app startup and navigation.

items: You can now subscribe to anime notifications

Scroll to top when you tap the same tab again

versions.highlight: The first release of Niro! Your ultimate anime and manga companion with MyAnimeList integration.

items: Browse seasonal anime, popular series, and top-ranked shows
Discover popular manga, novels, and manhwa
Search for your favorite anime and manga
View detailed information including synopsis, genres, and trailers

Manage your personal anime and manga lists
Track your watching/reading progress
Rate anime and manga from 0 to 10
Update your watching status (watching, completed, on hold, dropped, plan to watch)
View your profile and statistics
Get personalized anime recommendations
Browse character information for anime
Read and explore user reviews
View image galleries and watch trailers
Fast and smooth app performance with smart data loading
Beautiful animations throughout the app
Optimized for both iOS and Android devices
Quick image loading and display
